code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let t = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, n)
  i = i + 1
end

mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut j = 0
while j < nums.len()
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0 or v > cur
    cur = v
  end
  maxes = list.push(maxes, cur)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < maxes.len()
  let m = match maxes.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{m}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{m}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
